## Summary

Describe the user-visible and normative changes.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] Generated specification artifacts are current
- [ ] Examples and adversarial fixtures cover the change
- [ ] Package and specification version impacts were considered independently
- [ ] No credentials, private evidence, capability proofs, or personal data are included

## Change control

- [ ] Controller, rights, accounts, privacy, source authority, claims, or agent changes are called out for security review
- [ ] Specification changes include schema, rule metadata, migration notes, examples, and tests
